 {"id":"bd-w3rh","title":"Phase 4: Cross-Rig Bead Gates","description":"Implement cross-rig bead dependency gates.

## Behavior
- Gate waits on a bead in another rig
- Leverage existing external dep resolution via bd sync
- `bd ready` / `bd sync` resolves naturally

## Implementation
1. `bd cook` creates gate with external dep on target bead
2. Gate has `await_type=bead` and `await_id=<rig>:<bead-id>`
3. During bd sync, cross-rig deps are resolved
4. When target bead closes, gate can close

## Design Question
Should this piggyback on existing dependency resolution, or have explicit gate check?

Option A: Use existing blocking deps (simpler)
Option B: Explicit `bd gate check --type=bead` (more control)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Gates can reference beads in other rigs
- [ ] Gate resolves when target bead closes
- [ ] Works with bd sync for cross-rig resolution","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"beads/polecats/onyx","created_at":"2026-01-02T01:55:43.840566-08:00","created_by":"mayor","updated_at":"2026-01-02T13:05:51.785747-08:00","closed_at":"2026-01-02T13:05:51.785747-08:00","close_reason":"Implemented cross-rig bead gates: added await_type=bead with await_id=<rig>:<bead-id> format, added bd gate check command with --type=bead support","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-w3rh","depends_on_id":"bd-mcva","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-02T01:55:53.966328-08:00","created_by":"mayor"}]}
 {"id":"bd-w3z7","title":"Move cook to formula subcommand","description":"## Task
Move `bd cook` → `bd formula cook`

## Implementation

### 1. Update formula.go
- Add `cookCmd` as subcommand of `formulaCmd`
- Import necessary packages from cook.go if not already present

### 2. Update cook.go
- Remove `rootCmd.AddCommand(cookCmd)` from init()
- Keep the command implementation as-is

### 3. Create hidden alias for backwards compatibility
- In main.go or aliases file, add:
  ```go
  aliasCmd := &cobra.Command{
    Use:    "cook",
    Hidden: true,
    Run: func(cmd *cobra.Command, args []string) {
      // Forward to formula cook
    },
  }
  ```

### 4. Update docs
- docs/MOLECULES.md - if `bd cook` mentioned
- CHANGELOG.md - add deprecation notice

## Files to modify
- cmd/bd/formula.go (add subcommand)
- cmd/bd/cook.go (change registration)
- cmd/bd/main.go (add hidden alias)
","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-27T15:10:21.169344-08:00","created_by":"mayor","updated_at":"2025-12-27T16:00:56.582141-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-27T16:00:56.582141-08:00"}
